title: Pure Storage SAN port errors and fabric connectivity health
dataSources: FC port counters surfaced in `purestorage:alert` or hardware diagnostics on `purestorage:array`
app: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (5513)
spl:
index=storage (sourcetype="purestorage:alert" OR sourcetype="purestorage:array")
| search crc OR "link down" OR "port error" OR LOS OR "signal loss"
| eval port=coalesce(fc_port, port_name, interface)
| eval arr=coalesce(array_name, array)
| stats count as errs latest(_time) as last_seen by arr, port
| sort - errs
description: Physical layer issues on FC ports manifest as CRC and signal loss before host multipath exhausts. Early port-level visibility avoids mysterious latency across many LUNs.
value: Shortens SAN bridge troubleshooting and prevents prolonged degraded multipathing.
implementation: Ensure hardware alert categories are not filtered at the HF. Correlate with switch syslog (separate UC) using port WWPN lookup.

references.title: Pure Storage Unified Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase)
